sourcesContent:
import './Projects.css'; const Projects = () => { const projects = [

🚀 Projects

📚 Centralized Student Activity Management System

Developed a centralized platform to manage and track student activities across the institution. The system replaces manual verification processes with a structured admin approval workflow, making activity management faster and more organized.

Implemented secure authentication using JWT to enable role-based access control for administrators and users. Built analytics dashboards that display insights such as activity trends, top performing students, and verification status.

Designed a scalable full-stack architecture capable of supporting future features like student portals, digital badges, and institutional integrations.

Tech Stack: Next.js, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS, Git

🌿 Ayurvedic Diet Management System

Built a web-based diet management system focused on Ayurvedic dietary principles. The platform uses a custom nutritional dataset combined with structured schemas to map food items with their Ayurvedic properties for accurate recommendations.

Developed a rule-based decision engine that automatically generates personalized diet charts based on user inputs and health parameters, replacing slow manual diet planning methods with an efficient automated system.

Implemented modular APIs and optimized backend components to ensure fast data retrieval and scalable functionality.

Tech Stack: React, MySQL, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap

⏱ Task Scheduling Software

Developed a task scheduling application designed to help users organize and prioritize daily activities more efficiently. The system allows users to create, manage, and track tasks through a structured scheduling interface.

Implemented features such as task prioritization, deadline tracking, and efficient scheduling logic to improve productivity and task management. Focused on building a user-friendly interface with reliable backend functionality.

The project demonstrates practical application of software design principles and problem-solving in building productivity tools.

]; return (

Projects

{projects.map((project, index) => (

{project.name}

{project.description}

))}
); }; export default Projects;
